title: SDE-2 loop: heavy on Leadership Principles
excerpt: Four LP-heavy behavioral rounds, one system design on inventory, and a coding round on trees. Bar raiser focused on ownership and dive deep.
body: The loop spanned two days virtually. Every behavioral answer was probed with 'what would you do differently?' The system design was an inventory reservation service — expect follow-ups on consistency and peak traffic. Coding was medium LeetCode with emphasis on clean code and test cases.

title: L4 interview: algorithms + googliness
excerpt: Two coding rounds (graphs + DP), one system design lite, and a 'googleyness' conversation about collaboration.
body: Interviewers cared about thought process out loud. System design was a URL shortener with analytics. Googliness round asked about conflict and ambiguity — prepare concrete STAR stories.

title: Product engineer loop at Meta
excerpt: Product sense questions dominated. Expect 'why this design?' and metrics for success.
body: They wanted trade-offs between engagement and integrity. Coding was practical — parse logs and aggregate metrics. Behavioral tied to moving fast with guardrails.
